ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: On first sync, the Readwise plugin will create a new folder containing all your highlights
ast.target: 首次同步时，Readwise 插件将创建一个新文件夹，包含您所有的高亮内容

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: You can customize which items export to Obsidian and how they appear from the Readwise website
ast.target: 您可以从 Readwise 网站自定义哪些项目导出到 Obsidian 以及它们的显示方式

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: By default, the plugin will save all your highlights into a folder named Readwise
ast.target: 默认情况下，插件会将您所有的高亮内容保存到一个名为 Readwise 的文件夹中

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If not set to Manual, Readwise will automatically resync with Obsidian when the app is open at the specified interval
ast.target: 如果未设置为手动，Readwise 将在应用打开时按指定间隔自动与 Obsidian 重新同步

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, Readwise will automatically resync with Obsidian each time you open the app
ast.target: 如果启用，Readwise 将在每次打开应用时自动与 Obsidian 重新同步

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, you can refresh individual items by deleting the file in Obsidian and initiating a resync
ast.target: 如果启用，您可以通过删除 Obsidian 中的文件并启动重新同步来刷新单个项目

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The Readwise plugin enables automatic syncing of all your highlights from Kindle, Instapaper, Pocket, and more. Note: Requires Readwise account.
ast.target: Readwise 插件支持自动同步来自 Kindle、Instapaper、Pocket 等的所有高亮内容。注意：需要 Readwise 账户。
